Help us grow

Suggest a Restaurant

Found a brilliant family restaurant that's not on our list? Tell us about it — we'll research it and add it if it meets our standards.

We review all submissions within 7 days. We can't add every restaurant, but we'll research every suggestion.

🍽️ Kid FriendlyLondon

The most useful guide to family-friendly restaurants in London — built by parents, for parents.
